title: The Counterfeit Coin
actors: Vasilis Logothetidis, Ilia Livykou, Mimis Fotopoulos
plot: Pivoting around a shiny counterfeit gold sovereign freshly milled from the clandestine workshop of an otherwise honest goldsmith, four brief vignettes of human imperfection; seduction; fate; desire, and devotion inextricably inter...
